inputs.text: A game-ready 2D portrait head layer for a football player, front-facing face and head only, clean facial features, neutral expression, short athletic hairstyle, isolated head without body or background, flat game art style, soft consistent lighting, uniform skin tone, no hair accessories, high quality game asset
